glosses.fi: mukaan lukien; asti ja mukaan lukien
glosses.ja: 含めて; までを含めて

sentences.target: Das Ticket kostet einschließlich der Getränke 15 Euro.
sentences.reading: /das ˈtɪkɛt ˈkɔstət ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ gəˈtrɛŋkə ˈfʏnf͡tseːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/

translations.de: Das Ticket kostet einschließlich der Getränke 15 Euro.
translations.ipa: /das ˈtɪkɛt ˈkɔstət ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ gəˈtrɛŋkə ˈfʏnf͡tseːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/
translations.en: The ticket costs 15 euros, drinks included.
translations.es: La entrada cuesta 15 euros, bebidas incluidas.
translations.fr: Le billet coûte 15 euros, boissons incluses.
translations.it: Il biglietto costa 15 euro, bevande incluse.
translations.pt: O ingresso custa 15 euros, bebidas incluídas.
translations.vi: Vé có giá 15 euro, bao gồm đồ uống.
translations.nl: Het kaartje kost 15 euro, inclusief drankjes.
translations.hu: A jegy 15 euró, az italok benne vannak.
translations.hi: टिकट की कीमत 15 यूरो है, पेय शामिल हैं.
translations.el: Το εισιτήριο κοστίζει 15 ευρώ, τα ποτά συμπεριλαμβάνονται.
translations.nb: Billetten koster 15 euro, drikke er inkludert.
translations.ro: Biletul costă 15 euro, cu băuturi incluse.
translations.cs: Lístek stojí 15 eur, nápoje jsou v ceně.
translations.da: Billetten koster 15 euro, drikkevarer er inkluderet.
translations.fi: Lippu maksaa 15 euroa, juomat sisältyvät hintaan.
translations.ja: チケットは飲み物込みで15ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun 'Ticket'.
Head noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicates the price.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a PP specifying what is included.
Definite article, genitive plural; determiner within the PP headed by 'einschließlich'.
Noun in genitive plural; object of the preposition 'einschließlich'.
Cardinal numeral; numeric amount expressing the price.
Currency unit noun; measure noun accompanying the numeral.

sentences.target: Wir liefern einschließlich der Montage morgen.

translations.de: Wir liefern einschließlich der Montage morgen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天送货，包含安装。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giao hàng vào ngày mai, bao gồm lắp đặt.
translations.ar: نحن نسلّم غداً، بما في ذلك التركيب.
translations.hi: हम कल डिलीवर करेंगे, इंस्टॉलेशन सहित.
translations.pl: Dostarczymy jutro, z montażem w cenie.
translations.nb: Vi leverer i morgen, montering inkludert.
translations.sv: Vi levererar i morgon, montering ingår.
translations.da: Vi leverer i morgen, montering inkluderet.
translations.ja: 明日お届け、組み立ても込みです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present); denotes the action.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces what is included with the delivery.
Definite article, genitive singular feminine; determiner of 'Montage' in the PP.
Noun in genitive singular; object of 'einschließlich', indicating inclusion of installation.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the delivery.

sentences.target: Die Miete beträgt einschließlich der Nebenkosten 850 Euro.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈmiːtə bəˈtrɛːkt ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ ˈneːbənˌkɔstn̩ aχtˌhʊndɐt ˈfʏnf͡tsɪç ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/

translations.de: Die Miete beträgt einschließlich der Nebenkosten 850 Euro.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈmiːtə bəˈtrɛːkt ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ ˈneːbənˌkɔstn̩ aχtˌhʊndɐt ˈfʏnf͡tsɪç ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/
translations.en: The rent comes to 850 euros, including utilities.
translations.es: El alquiler es de 850 euros, con gastos incluidos.
translations.fr: Le loyer est de 850 euros, charges comprises.
translations.it: L'affitto è di 850 euro, spese incluse.
translations.zh-Hans: 房租为850欧元，包含水电等杂费。
translations.ru: Аренда составляет 850 евро, коммунальные услуги включены.
translations.pt: O aluguel é de 850 euros, contas incluídas.
translations.he: שכר הדירה הוא 850 אירו, כולל חשבונות.
translations.vi: Tiền thuê là 850 euro, đã bao gồm điện nước.
translations.nl: De huur is 850 euro, inclusief nutsvoorzieningen.
translations.uk: Оренда становить 850 євро, комунальні послуги включені.
translations.hu: A bérleti díj 850 euró, a rezsi benne van.
translations.hi: किराया 850 यूरो है, बिजली-पानी शामिल है.
translations.el: Το ενοίκιο είναι 850 ευρώ, οι λογαριασμοί περιλαμβάνονται.
translations.nb: Husleien er 850 euro, inkludert strøm kai vann.
translations.id: Sewa 850 euro, termasuk listrik dan air.
translations.sv: Hyran är 850 euro, inklusive el och vatten.
translations.ro: Chiria este 850 de euro, cu utilități incluse.
translations.da: Huslejen eίvai 850 euro, inklusive el, vand og varme.
translations.fi: Vuokra on 850 euroa, sisältäen sähkön ja veden.
translations.ja: 家賃は光熱費込みで850ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Miete'.
Head noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); expresses the total amount.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces the inclusive component of the amount.
Definite article, genitive plural; determiner of 'Nebenkosten' in the PP.
Plural noun in genitive; object of 'einschließlich', specifying included ancillary costs.
Cardinal numeral; numeric amount of the rent.
Currency unit noun; measure noun paired with the numeral.

sentences.target: Ich habe einschließlich der Pausen drei Stunden gearbeitet.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ ˈpaʊ̯zən dʁaɪ̯ ˈʃtʊndən ɡəˈaʁbaɪ̯tət/

translations.de: Ich habe einschließlich der Pausen drei Stunden gearbeitet.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nʃliːslɪç deːɐ̯ ˈpaʊ̯zən dʁaɪ̯ ˈʃtʊndən ɡəˈaʁbaɪ̯tət/
translations.en: I worked three hours including breaks.
translations.es: Trabajé tres horas con pausas incluidas.
translations.fr: J'ai travaillé trois heures, pauses comprises.
translations.it: Ho lavorato tre ore, pause incluse.
translations.ko: 쉬는 시간을 포함해서 세 시간 일했어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我工作了三小时，包括休息时间。
translations.yue: 我連休息時間一共做咗三個鐘。
translations.ru: Я работал три часа, включая перерывы.
translations.pt: Trabalhei três horas, com intervalos incluídos.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc ba giờ, bao gồm thời gian nghỉ.
translations.ar: عملت ثلاث ساعات، بما في ذلك فترات الاستراحة.
translations.nl: Ik heb drie uur gewerkt, inclusief pauzes.
translations.uk: Я працював три години, включно з перервами.
translations.hi: मैंने ब्रेक सहित तीन घंटे काम किया.
translations.el: Δούλεψα τρεις ώρες, συμπεριλαμβανομένων των διαλειμμάτων.
translations.nb: Jeg jobbet i tre timer, inkludert pauser.
translations.id: Saya bekerja selama tiga jam, termasuk waktu istirahat.
translations.sv: Jag arbetade i tre timmar, inklusive pauser.
translations.ro: Am lucrat trei ore, inclusiv pauze.
translations.cs: Pracoval jsem tři hodiny, včetně přestávek.
translations.da: Jeg arbejdede i tre timer, inklusive pauser.
translations.fi: Tein töitä kolme tuntia, tauot mukaan lukien.
translations.ja: 休憩を含めて3時間働きました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite auxiliary (1st person singular, present); forms the perfect with the participle.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces what is included in the stated duration.
Definite article, genitive plural; determiner of 'Pausen' in the PP.
Plural noun in genitive; object of 'einschließlich'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Stunden'.
Plural noun; adverbial accusative of duration specifying how long the action lasted.
Past participle of the main verb; forms the perfect predicate together with 'habe'.
